mapper.select: SELECT idempotency_key_hash, run_id, task_id, attempt_id, attempt_index, status, claimed_by, claimed_at, lease_expires_at, CAST(result_jsonb AS TEXT) AS result_jsonb, outcome_status, completed_at FROM agent_idempotency_record WHERE idempotency_key_hash = #{idempotencyKeyHash}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_idempotency_record ( idempotency_key_hash, run_id, task_id, attempt_id, attempt_index, status, claimed_by, claimed_at, lease_expires_at ) VALUES ( #{idempotencyKeyHash}, #{runId}, #{taskId}, #{attemptId}, #{attemptIndex}, 'CLAIMED', #{claimedBy}, #{claimedAt}, #{leaseExpiresAt} ) ON CONFLICT (idempotency_key_hash) DO NOTHING
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_idempotency_record SET run_id = #{runId}, task_id = #{taskId}, attempt_id = #{attemptId}, attempt_index = #{attemptIndex}, status = 'CLAIMED', claimed_by = #{claimedBy}, claimed_at = #{claimedAt}, lease_expires_at = #{leaseExpiresAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE idempotency_key_hash = #{idempotencyKeyHash} AND status = 'CLAIMED' AND lease_expires_at <= #{claimedAt}

UPDATE agent_idempotency_record SET status = 'COMPLETED', result_jsonb = CAST(#{resultJson} AS jsonb), outcome_status = #{outcomeStatus}, completed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE idempotency_key_hash = #{idempotencyKeyHash} AND status = 'CLAIMED' AND claimed_by = #{claimedBy}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_idempotency_record ( idempotency_key_hash, run_id, task_id, attempt_id, attempt_index, status, result_jsonb, outcome_status, completed_at ) VALUES ( #{idempotencyKeyHash}, #{runId}, #{taskId}, #{attemptId}, #{attemptIndex}, 'COMPLETED', CAST(#{resultJson} AS jsonb), #{outcomeStatus}, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (idempotency_key_hash) DO NOTHING
